description_long: This lighthouse features a tall, cylindrical tower with a classic red and white horizontal stripe pattern, set on a circular grassy base. The upper section is adorned with a prominent gallery balcony encircling a lantern room, topped by an ornate, pointed roof with decorative spires. The structure includes several architectural details such as arched windows, a small entry door at the base, and a suspended platform or lift on one side. Mechanical elements, including a large gear and a propeller-like device, are attached to the base, suggesting a blend of traditional and steampunk influences. The masonry construction is evident in the textured stonework, while the metalwork of the balcony and roof adds contrast. The overall design is both functional and decorative, making it a striking landmark suitable for an urban waterfront or park setting.
description: A tall, red-and-white striped lighthouse with a gallery balcony, ornate spired roof, and mechanical steampunk elements on a circular grassy base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry door, the circular grassy base, and the full height of the striped tower with the ornate roof and balcony.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the suspended platform/lift, mechanical gear, and propeller, as well as the detailed balcony and spired roof.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the tower, the circular base, and a side-mounted pipe or vent, with less emphasis on the mechanical elements.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the platform/lift from a different angle, the gear, and the full extent of the balcony and roof details.
